title: tetragonanthus deflexus
intro: Tetragonanthus deflexus, also known as the "dwarf bitter leaf" or "small bitter leaf", is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and distinctive bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tetragonanthus deflexus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Tetragonanthus deflexus is often used in tea infusions, decoctions, and infusions, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
